channel.title: Horror on DungeonPath — Free Game Guides & Walkthroughs
channel.description: Recent content in Horror on DungeonPath — Free Game Guides & Walkthroughs

item.title: DOORS Entities Bestiary: Every Entity, How to Survive, and What They Drop (2026)
item.description: Complete DOORS entities bestiary covering The Hotel, Mines, and Outdoors. Learn behavior, survival strategies, spawn conditions, and danger ratings for all entities.

item.title: DOORS Speedrun Guide: How to Beat The Hotel, The Mines, and The Outdoors Fast (2026)
item.description: Master DOORS speedrunning. Learn optimal routes, skip strategies, time-saving techniques, and record-breaking tips for all three floors.

item.title: DOORS The Mines Walkthrough: Complete Floor 2 Guide with All Entities, Items, and Strategies (2026)
item.description: Complete walkthrough for The Mines in DOORS Floor 2. Learn every door strategy, entity encounter, item location, and boss fight for the entire floor.

item.title: DOORS The Outdoors Walkthrough: Complete Floor 3 Guide with All Entities and Strategies (2026)
item.description: Complete walkthrough for The Outdoors in DOORS Floor 3. Learn entity encounters, environmental hazards, and survival strategies for the final floor.

item.title: Lethal Company Advanced Strategies Guide: Late-Game, Quota Scaling, and Max-Efficiency (2026)
item.description: Master late-game Lethal Company with advanced strategies. Learn quota scaling math, weather tactics, max-efficiency loot routes, and more.

item.title: Lethal Company Beginner Guide: Survive Your First Quota (2026)
item.description: New to Lethal Company? This beginner guide covers the core game loop, first quota tutorial, essential survival tips, and common mistakes to avoid.

item.title: Lethal Company Co-op Team Roles Guide: Optimal 4-Player Team Composition (2026)
item.description: Learn optimal 4-player team composition in Lethal Company. Ship Operator, Scout, Hauler, and Support roles with communication protocols.

item.title: Lethal Company Equipment Guide: Best Items, Costs, and Loadouts (2026)
item.description: Complete equipment guide for Lethal Company with real item costs, best early purchases, team loadout strategies, and which items are traps.

item.title: Lethal Company Monster Bestiary: Every Entity Explained (2026)
item.description: Complete monster bestiary for Lethal Company with all 12+ entities. Learn behaviors, counter-strategies, danger levels, and detection methods.

item.title: Lethal Company Moons Guide: Complete Moon Rankings and Strategies (2026)
item.description: Every moon in Lethal Company ranked by difficulty with loot values, monster spawns, travel costs, weather effects, and profit strategies.

item.title: Lethal Company Scrap and Loot Guide: Complete Item Database (2026)
item.description: Complete scrap and loot database for Lethal Company with every item, value ranges, weight classes, and value rankings to maximize profits.

item.title: Lethal Company Terminal Commands Guide: Complete Reference (2026)
item.description: Complete terminal command reference for Lethal Company. Every command including moons, store, bestiary, scan, switch, ping, and hidden commands.

item.title: Pressure Common Mistakes Guide: 15 Things New Players Get Wrong (and How to Fix Them) (2026)
item.description: Avoid the most common mistakes new Pressure players make. Learn what not to do, why they cost runs, and how to fix them.

item.title: Pressure Multiplayer Guide: Co-op Strategies, Team Roles, and Communication Tips (2026)
item.description: Master Pressure multiplayer with co-op strategies, team role assignments, communication tips, and group survival techniques.

item.title: Pressure Pro Survival Tips: Advanced Strategies to Reach Floor 100 (2026)
item.description: Advanced survival strategies for Pressure. Learn entity avoidance, resource management, and navigation to reach the deepest levels.

item.title: DOORS Beginner Guide (May 2026): Survive The Hotel, The Mines, and Beyond
item.description: Complete walkthrough for Roblox DOORS. Learn every entity, puzzle solution, item strategy, and how to conquer Rush Mode and Endless Mode.

item.title: Pressure Beginner Guide: Complete Walkthrough for New Players (2026)
item.description: Learn to survive the Hadal Blacksite in Roblox Pressure. Master entity mechanics, item locations, and proven strategies to reach Room 100.
